description: Mapping for upstream officer data from data.stfc.space: summary-officer.json and related translation tables.

loca_id.description: Localization id for this officer; resolved via translations-officers.json or translations-officer_names.json.

rarity.description: Upstream officer rarity (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, etc.).

grade.description: Officer grade; not directly used by the simulator.

faction.description: Officer faction information; may include id and loca_id.

id.description: Buff id used by data.stfc.space for officer abilities.

loca_id.description: Localization id for this buff; resolved via translations-officer_buffs.json when present.

value_is_percentage.description: If true, values[].value is percentage-like; if false, values may be flat.

values.description: Per-level buff values for this officer ability.

relations.description: Officer name and flavor text are resolved via translations-officer_names.json / translations-officers.json using loca_id.
Officer buff names/descriptions are resolved via translations-officer_buffs.json using loca_id and key patterns.
Kobayashi officers are defined in LCARS/canonical JSON; upstream officer ids may be recorded as provenance but LCARS remains the source of truth for abilities.

normalization_targets.description: Officer ids and names from upstream can be used as hints when maintaining the canonical officer catalog but are not authoritative for ability mechanics.

notes: Officer ability mechanics in Kobayashi are driven by LCARS YAML and officers.canonical.json, not by upstream officer buff stats.
Use upstream officer data primarily for cross-referencing ids, names, and rarity/faction metadata.
